reason: This is a high-quality sample with a coherent task blueprint that is well-reflected in the trajectory. The assistant appropriately uses all four tool types (list_dir, search_files, read_file, write_file) to methodically explore, search, read, and summarize the workspace contents. The user sounds like a realistic DOT official making plausible requests with natural follow-ups. The assistant remains well-grounded in tool outputs throughout, correctly identifying road/transport files that were initially hidden in unexpected locations. The only minor issue is one failed tool call ('infrastructure' search returned an error) which was handled without major disruption. The task was fully completed with a summary saved to the outputs directory.
